products.name: Samsung Galaxy Ring AI Smart Ring
products.description: A lightweight titanium smart ring that tracks sleep, heart rate, and activity without a subscription fee. Designed for all-day comfort with Samsung Health integration.
pros: Seamless integration with Samsung Health ecosystem
Grade 5 titanium with scratch-resistant concave design
Up to 7 days of claimed battery life
cons: Requires sizing kit — standard ring sizes don't fit
No built-in GPS; relies on phone for location tracking
Heart rate accuracy can be inconsistent during workouts
Stress tracking reported as unreliable by multiple reviewers
Some users report rapid battery drain after weeks of use
Rare cases of battery swelling reported (Samsung investigating)
